outcome.note: Measured after training the edited schema in the next iteration.

outcome_decision.reason: Hack risk improved, but internal task/semantic evidence dropped enough that this schema should not be the next base.
Hack risk improved, but internal task/semantic evidence dropped enough that this schema should not be the next base.

quality.interpretation: Mixed evidence; do not treat as a stable lesson.

what_failed: Coupled rebalancing (decrease r_approach_region + relax duration) insufficient to induce landing
Coupled rebalancing (decrease r_approach_region + increase terminal weight) caused slight degradation and no landing
Adding r_landing_region_progress with high weight 2.0 caused major reward collapse
avoid_next: Solo decrease of dominant shaping component without terminal boost
Increasing terminal bonus weight without verifying reachability
Adding new dense component with weight >0.5
recommend_next: Conduct structural search for a low-weight (≤0.5) bridging descent reward
Consider minor further decrease of r_approach_region only if bridging component proves effective
applicability_notes: When terminal event never triggers despite rebalancing, an intermediate dense reward may provide the missing gradient. Must use very low weight to avoid dominance.

lesson_card.summary: Agent hovers at pad due to dominance of r_approach_region, never triggering terminal landing events. Previous edits to weaken approach and boost terminal or add high-weight progress reward failed. A structural search is needed to identify a safe low-weight (≤0.5) bridging descent reward to connect hovering to landing.
